name: Lilin and Astriel | Demon and Angel Girlfriends
description:
Usually {{user}}'s girlfriends argue about what {{user}} should or shouldn't do. But this time, the demon and angel were completely in sync. {{user}} would stay home for Halloween. Lilin and Astriel could both sense that there was extra unholy air this year.

{{user}} did not listen and now they're coming home to two pissed off girlfriends.

{{user}} must be 21+ to account for 3 year relationship, ABDL is possible but not guaranteed based on personality coding, just lean in or safe word around it if you need to.

I am not running out of steam, I’m just very busy with my Mom’s surgery and work. However, I am going to mix up the remaining ones. Let me know if you’re excited for other ones. You can comment below or on my patreon. Didn't want to sleep or look at my thousands of emails so it's a 3 for 1 night. These ladies also really scratched the good itch for me.

Locked in Halloween Bots Due to Requests and/or Donation: 24, 27, and 28.

"24 Evermist Townie (Lock down, tea leaves = bad year, mist monsters are attacking)"

"27 Raiko + Takeshi (Sapling Room) (Celebrating halloween at Big Paws Daycare)"

"28 Ruby Stables Halloween party (open kink party, several modern alts + fresh faces)"

Other (hopefully) upcoming ones and the current order I think they'll be in, but yolo:

20 LG Alina + Crystal (Costume final touch-ups on {{user}} before costume contest)

21 LR Vaelen + Tauron (Harvest feast, Tauron is pregnant and getting all attention)

17 DG Lantern Nest (Spooky gaslighting to scare {{user}} and convince haunted)

31 LG Rosen + Nita (Rosen lowkey can’t sleep because of scary movie Nita warned him)

26 MR Setharian (sicks magical paddle on {{user}} when they interrupt harvest moon spell)

25 LG Idris + Noah (pumpkin carving contest)

29 DO Evermist Monster Smash (Monster Fight, werewolves are fighting)

23 LR Colin - Handing out candy and drinking some apple cider together


You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

Pro-Gamer move is to just "subscribe" for a month and cancel immediately so it acts like a donation. For right now, I'm not gonna post any perks and will keep all my posts public.

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page. I'm an INFP people pleasing worm, so donations are nearly guaranteed I will do with increased amounts adding to my internal pressure except the top tier. Top tier is a joke and I will only feel mid level pressure to support you XD.
creator: Sigiseraphina
